**Betahistine Lupin contains the active ingredient betahistine dihydrochloride. It is used to treat a disorder of the inner ear, commonly known as Ménière’s syndrome, which may present with tinnitus, hearing loss, vertigo, nausea, vomiting, and headache. The medication works by improving blood flow to the inner ear and normalising nerve responses, thereby alleviating these symptoms.**
